guidance: Verdicts and output format follow the rubric in references/verdicts.md. Sweep semantically for prescription-detected sentences — a research-log report presents facts and how they connect, never recommendations. One institutional publisher = one primary source; flag source-count overclaims.
note: This complements a single-context fact-checker subagent: the agent reads everything in one context; this workflow fans out one verifier per claim for long reports where a single context would degrade.
